problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
